allowed_user.title: Allowed User Whitelist
allowed_user.description: Represents an email address that is allowed to access the application without a password.

email.description: The allowed email address of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this email was added to the whitelist.

addedBy.description: The email address of the admin/user who added this entry.

/allowed_users/{userId}.description: Collection of whitelisted emails allowed to access the publisher dashboard.
